footer.tagline: Real conversations. Real people. No algorithm needed.

about.hero_title: Dating apps had their moment. This is what comes next.
about.hero_subtitle: We host real-life speed dating events — no swiping, no ghosting, no endless matches you never meet. Just 5-minute face-to-face conversations with people who are actually there to connect.
about.value_minimalist_text: Show up. Meet people. That's it. No profile setup, no waiting for matches, no awkward DMs. We do the hard part so you don't have to.
about.value_experience_text: We cap attendance, balance gender ratios, and curate venues. Every event is designed for real conversation, not chaotic networking.
about.value_connectivity_text: 82% of attendees get at least one match. Many come back every month. The best relationships start with a real conversation.
about.for_individuals_text: If you've been ghosted one too many times or just want to actually talk to someone in person — this is for you. No swiping required.
about.for_organizers_text: Looking to list your speed dating events? Reach an audience that's already excited to attend and connect in real life.
about.cta_title: Ready to quit the apps for one evening?
about.cta_subtitle: Find an event near you and reserve your spot before it fills up.

cookie_banner.title: We value your privacy
cookie_banner.text: We use cookies to improve your experience, analyze site traffic, and personalize content. By clicking "Accept", you consent to the use of cookies on our site for analysis and metrics (including Google Analytics).
